description_long: This is a stylized adult male pedestrian dressed in modern urban streetwear. He wears a puffy jacket with a large letter 'R' on the back, paired with jogger-style pants featuring graphic designs and a mix of patterns. A crossbody strap with a plush toy accessory is slung over his shoulder, and he has a face mask covering his lower face. His hair is styled in a spiky, voluminous fashion, and he wears casual sneakers. The overall appearance is trendy and youthful, with attention to detail in the clothing and accessories.
description: A trendy adult male in urban streetwear with a puffy jacket, joggers, crossbody strap, plush toy, and face mask.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plush toy on the chest, face mask, and detailed jacket and pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the crossbody strap, plush toy, and the layered look of the outfit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large 'R' on the jacket, the full crossbody strap, and graphic details on the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the plush toy, strap, and the graphic design on the pants' leg.
attribute_clothing_type: urban streetwear with a puffy jacket, jogger pants, and a face mask
